title: Hefty Tablet
description: Upon pickup, choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]3[/blue] Rare cards to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold], and add [blue]1[/blue] [red]Injury[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Upon obtaining this relic, triggers an interactive choice where you select 1 card from 3 offered Rare cards, then 1 Injury card is automatically added to your deck.
